cases.name: synthetic-fr-early-print
cases.provenance: synthetic — reference written for this corpus; source derived by scripted degradations (long s, fi ligature, one rn confusion). See README.md.

cases.name: ocr17-descartes-discours-p14
cases.provenance: real — OCR17+ (Simon Gabay et al., e-ditiones, CC-BY), Descartes 1637 Discours de la méthode (ark btv1b86069594) p.14: raw Transkribus OCR (Word-level, re-exposed at line level by derive_ocr17.py) vs upstream human-corrected reference. See README.md and examples/page/PROVENANCE.md.
